name: Frozen Chocolate Crunch Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the pudding mix with 1 cup of cold milk as directed on the package.
2. Fold in the Cool Whip.
3. Stir in 1 cup of finely crushed Oreos and the "rocks" (any combination of chocolate chips, peanut butter chips, chopped peanuts or pecans, granola bar chunks, butterfinger candy bars, or crushed).
4. Spoon the mixture into a prepared pie crust.
5. Sprinkle with remaining cookies.
6. Freeze for 4 hours or overnight.
7. Let stand at room temperature for 10 minutes before serving.
8. Store any leftover pie in the freezer.
